name: Nyx Assassin
description: The blessing of Nyx gives me all the purpose I require. Nyx Assassin

abilities.name: Mana Burn
abilities.description: Offensively removes the affected enemy unit's mana per Nyx's ability cast and item ability casts.

abilities.name: Impale
abilities.description: Rock spike burst from the earth along a straight path. Immediately damages and stuns enemy units while being hurled into the air.

abilities.name: Mind Flare
abilities.description: Deals a base damage based on the affected enemy unit's max mana, and additional damage equal to a percentage of the damage taken from Nyx previously.

abilities.name: Spiked Carapace
abilities.description: While above ground, Spiked Carapace reflects, negates one damage instance per damage source, and stuns the damage source as well. Spiked Carapace under the scarab's hood is akin to wielding a Blade Mail. Damage reflected from the item's active ability deals 0-damage instances while Spiked Carapace is active.

abilities.name: Burrow
abilities.description: Some castes of zealot scarab are known to create small burrows to lie in wait, ready to ambush their prey.

abilities.name: Vendetta
abilities.description: Grants the next attack a faster attack animation with attack range bonus. The attack breaking invisibility applies a Break, and deals pure spell damage bonus with the attack. Applies a secondary self-buff that grants unobstructed pathing and movement speed bonus upon cast. Reduces cooldown.
